live_personalize_description: 錄一段簡短自述（可選分享地區），讓 Live 更貼合你的偏好。
live_personalize_record_desc: 用 20–40 秒說說你的目標、喜歡的話題，以及希望怎麼糾錯。
live_personalize_privacy_note: 我們不會保存音訊或原始座標。
live_personalize_geo_desc: 我們只會用一次位置來推斷國家/地區/城市，不保存座標。
live_personalize_success: 已保存，下次開始 Live 時生效。
live_personalize_tour_record_desc: 說說你的目標和偏好，我們會用它產生 Live 的個人設定。
live_personalize_tour_geo_desc: 分享一次位置來推斷國家/地區/城市（不保存座標）。
live_personalize_tour_generate_desc: 會在你下次開始 Live 時生效。
live_observer_empty: 尚無洞察，執行觀察者以產生筆記。
live_assessment_empty: 結束通話後將顯示評估結果。
live_history_empty_hint: 開始一次即時通話後會顯示在這裡。
live_history_delete_confirm: 確定刪除此會話？此動作無法復原。
hero_description: FluentluBy.ai helps you bridge the gap to fluency. Turn your favorite content into interactive language lessons with AI-powered chat, summaries, and real-world practice.
screenshot_caption: Ask questions about the video content directly
features_desc_1: Learning Spanish and Japanese? No problem. FluentluBy.ai supports any language available on YouTube.
features_desc_2: Don't just watch—interact. Have a conversation with the video characters or the content itself.
features_desc_3: Step into the scene. Practice real-world conversations simulated from the video context.
features_desc_4: Your content, your choice. Select any video from your YouTube playlists to start learning immediately.
faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about mastering languages with FluentluBy.ai.
faq_q1: Is FluentluBy.ai suitable for complete beginners?
faq_a1: FluentluBy.ai is optimized for intermediate to advanced learners who already have a basic grasp of the language. We focus on bridging the gap to fluency using authentic native content, which can be overwhelming for absolute beginners.
faq_a2: You can learn any language! Since our platform is built on top of YouTube, if you can find a video in that language with captions, you can learn it with FluentluBy.ai.
faq_q3: How does the 'Chat with Video' feature work?
faq_a3: Our AI analyzes the video's transcript and context to create an interactive comprehension experience. You can ask specific questions about what happened, request explanations of cultural nuances, or even role-play with characters from the video.
faq_q4: Do I need a paid YouTube account?
faq_a4: No, you don't need a YouTube Premium account. FluentluBy.ai works with standard YouTube videos available publicly.
footer_text: FluentluBy.ai. Master languages with the videos you love.
